executive_summary:
PARK: Glen Caravan Park
SCORE: 32/100
DATE SCORED: 2025
REVIEWS ANALYSED: 17

WHY THIS SCORE:
Entertainment (3/20) — No kids entertainment facilities mentioned; one family reviewer explicitly stated park has a pool but management and permanent residents are hostile to children making normal play noise; described as "not a place for families"
Nature (16/20) — Strong natural setting with "real rainforest" environment; multiple reviews praise "tonnes of lizards and bush turkeys", palm trees, wildlife, and shaded sites; good access to Sunshine Coast Hinterland
Cleanliness (3/15) — Major cleanliness issues dominate recent reviews: cabins "full of cobwebs and spiders", "cockroaches crawling across my face", "filthy amenities", "toilets blocked constantly"; only 2 older reviews mention "spotless" amenities before ownership change
Value (6/15) — Described as "budget accommodation" with "reasonable rates" but multiple families felt it was "ridiculous" value given poor conditions; several guests left early and sought refunds
Site Size (4/10) — Mixed feedback: some mention "large sites" and "big site" but recent reviews note "very tight site", "tight parking", and "smaller side compared to other van parks"
Sentiment (2/10) — Severely negative for families; one detailed 1-star review states children were "abused" for playing, family felt "unsafe", manager was "aggressive"; multiple guests left early; permanent residents create unwelcoming atmosphere
Location (8/10) — Strong location score: "walking distance to Nambour", "close to Cole's and Aldi", "15 minutes to central Maroochydore", beaches and hinterland areas accessible

WHY NOT 100:
1. Explicitly not family-friendly with hostile environment toward children making normal play noise, resulting in families leaving early and feeling unsafe
2. Severe cleanliness and maintenance failures including cockroaches, spiders, blocked toilets, broken facilities, and run-down cabins that reviewers described as worst they'd experienced
3. Complete absence of kids entertainment, playground equipment, or family activities, with management changes removing amenities like bird cages and operational washing machines

NOTABLE REVIEW PHRASES:
"not a place for families", "abused for them making noise", "cockroaches crawling across my face", "toilets blocked constantly", "worst park we have ever stayed", "filthy amenities", "Real rainforest", "wouldn't leave out a blade of grass"
rationale_top3: Severely hostile environment toward families with children, with reports of verbal abuse from management and permanent residents for normal play noise, causing guests to leave early and feel unsafe Critical cleanliness and maintenance failures including cockroaches in cabins, spiders, constantly blocked toilets, filthy amenities, and broken facilities described as the worst guests had experienced Complete absence of family entertainment infrastructure with no playground, kids activities, or family-friendly amenities, and management changes removing existing facilities
rationale_honourable: Strong natural rainforest setting with abundant wildlife including lizards and bush turkeys, providing good shade and authentic hinterland atmosphere for nature appreciators
water_fun: Pool mentioned but limited child-specific facilities
kids_play: No playground or kids entertainment mentioned
pet_detail: Dogs mentioned in reviews but manager threatened pound for off-leash incidents
best_for: Budget-conscious single travellers or couples seeking natural rainforest setting
